category_sources: Official README says ouch is a CLI tool for compressing and decompressing various formats.
source_facts.description says it provides painless compression and decompression for the terminal.
docs_sources: Official README includes features, usage, supported formats, installation, and build instructions.
Official README points to the GitHub wiki for compiling from source.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/ouch-org/ouch; per instruction, not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: Official GitHub topics include rust, cli, compression, and decompression.
Official README describes compress, decompress, and list subcommands plus supported archive formats.
